overview: The OpenCode desktop Electron app shows moderate decoupling quality. The main process has been recently refactored with a DI pattern for IPC handlers, validation extraction, and module separation. However, significant hardcoded assumptions remain in app identity, paths, URLs, and OS-specific branching. The preload bridge is fully typed but uses magic-string channels throughout. Test coverage is minimal (one validation test file).

hardcoded_assumptions.what: GitHub OAuth client ID hardcoded as string literal 'Iv23li7XUy0RKw5TlZ3K'
GitHub token endpoint URL 'https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token' hardcoded
GitHub authorize URL assembled from hardcoded fragments with client_id and redirect_uri
App names ('OpenCode Dev', 'OpenCode Beta', 'OpenCode') hardcoded per channel
App IDs ('ai.opencode.desktop.dev', etc.) hardcoded per channel — duplicated in migrate.ts
App ID Record duplicated from index.ts — divergent change risk
macOS app paths '/Applications/${name}.app', '/System/Applications/${name}.app' hardcoded
Homebrew app path '${HOME}/Applications/${name}.app' hardcoded
Custom protocol scheme 'oc' hardcoded as renderer protocol
Renderer host 'renderer' hardcoded
Default window dimensions 1280x800 hardcoded
macOS traffic light position {x:12, y:14} hardcoded
Loading window dimensions 640x480 hardcoded
Health check endpoint '/global/health' hardcoded — assumes server route
CORS origin 'oc://renderer' hardcoded — coupled to protocol scheme
Brittle filename-to-store-name mapping: 'opencode.settings.dat' → 'opencode.settings'
Experimental flags 'OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_ICON_DISCOVERY' and 'FILEWATCHER' set to 'true' unconditionally
MAX_LOG_AGE_DAYS=7, MAX_EXPORT_FILE_SIZE=50MB, NET_LOG_SIZE=20MB hardcoded
Updater channel 'latest', allowPrerelease=false, allowDowngrade=true hardcoded
RESERVED_STORE_NAMES hardcoded array — needs code change to extend
Dialog titles ('Export Session', 'Import Session', 'Choose a folder') hardcoded in main process

main_process.ipc_pattern_details: 54 of 60 handlers registered centrally in ipc.ts via registerIpcHandlers(deps) with DI injection. 6 handlers in github-ipc.ts register directly to ipcMain.handle() outside the central function. No centralized IPC channel registry — all 50+ channels are magic strings. No channel name constants file.
main_process.platform_details: 16 platform checks across 5 files. Heaviest in windows.ts (6 checks for frame/titlebar/dock), apps.ts (3 for macOS app paths), migrate.ts (3 for Tauri path per OS). Menu is entirely macOS-only.
main_process.di_details: IPC handlers use typed Deps object (good). github-ipc.ts does NOT use DI — registers directly to ipcMain and calls getStore() internally. No DI for config access.

security_concerns: 'open-path' channel invokes execFile with user-supplied 'app' parameter — no validation beyond platform routing
'open-link' channel calls shell.openExternal with no protocol validation
'github-get-token' sends decrypted token to renderer over IPC in plaintext
'relaunch' channel triggers app.relaunch() + app.exit(0) with no guard
'github-api-proxy' has hostname allowlist but fetch error serializes to JSON string — caller must parse
All 60 IPC handlers lack authentication — any renderer context can invoke any handler
positive_security: RESERVED_STORE_NAMES guards on 5 of 7 store IPC handlers
GitHub tokens encrypted via safeStorage.encryptString at rest
Custom protocol handler validates host and path to prevent directory traversal

config_details: No centralized AppConfig class. Settings use electron-store via factory pattern (getStore()) with lazy singleton cache. 5 named stores used across 5 modules. Constants are store key names only. No typed config accessor — every module calls getStore() with string keys. OPENCODE_CHANNEL is build-time (import.meta.env) not runtime-configurable.

coverage_gaps: No IPC handler tests — none of the 60 handlers have automated tests
No preload bridge tests — window.api surface untested
No window management tests — window creation, sizing, positioning
No e2e tests for the desktop app
test_infrastructure.test_quality: The one validation test file (ipc-plugin-config.test.ts) is well-structured with 20+ focused tests for validation functions. shell-env.test.ts exists but was not fully analyzed.

recent_commits_desktop: feat(desktop): Phase 2 — Plugin Management UI (Julian Torres)
feat(desktop): Phase 2 MCP Server Management UI (Julian Torres)
fix(desktop): remove orphaned install-cli import (Julian Torres)
feat(desktop): Phase 1 feature parity — agent config UI (Julian Torres)
git_history.evolution_pattern: Recent commits show active refactoring — GitHub IPC extracted to github-ipc.ts, validation extracted to ipc-validation.ts, install-cli removed. The architecture is actively being improved.

top_hardcoded_assumptions.assumption: GitHub OAuth client ID is Iv23li7XUy0RKw5TlZ3K
top_hardcoded_assumptions.impact: Cannot rebrand, fork, or use a different GitHub OAuth app without code changes. Security concern — secret in source.

top_hardcoded_assumptions.assumption: App identity (names and IDs) tied to channel
top_hardcoded_assumptions.impact: Full identity matrix duplicated in migrate.ts. Any identity change requires two coordinated edits.
Cross-platform app has macOS-specific paths hardcoded. Non-portable and non-configurable.

top_hardcoded_assumptions.assumption: Custom protocol is 'oc' and renderer host is 'renderer'
top_hardcoded_assumptions.impact: Protocol name coupled across windows.ts (scheme, host), sidecar.ts (CORS origin), and index.ts (protocol client). Changing requires touching 3 files.

top_hardcoded_assumptions.assumption: All 50+ IPC channels are magic string literals
top_hardcoded_assumptions.impact: No compile-time check for channel name typos. Silent dead channel if preload and main disagree. No channel documentation.
Not configurable by user without code change. Loading window always 640x480, non-resizable.
Coupled to the server's routing layout. If the server changes its health endpoint, the desktop app silently fails health checks.

top_hardcoded_assumptions.assumption: Dialog strings are English-only in main process
top_hardcoded_assumptions.impact: All dialog messages and button labels are hardcoded English strings in the main process. No i18n support for native dialogs.

strengths: IPC handler DI pattern: registerIpcHandlers(deps) takes a typed dependency object — testable and swappable
Full typing: ElectronAPI interface is fully typed, renderer sees window.api: ElectronAPI via global augmentation
Security baseline: contextIsolation=true, nodeIntegration=false, sandbox=true on all windows
Reserved store namespace protection prevents renderer from accessing sensitive data stores
Write serialization via serializedWrite prevents concurrent write corruption to electron-store
Preload listener subscriptions return cleanup functions (idiomatic memory management)
Validation layer extracted to ipc-validation.ts with type guards — testable independently of Electron
GitHub OAuth handlers extracted to github-ipc.ts — modular separation of concerns
Effect library used for structured concurrency (Deferred, Fiber, Effect.gen) in main process lifecycle
Window recovery system (wireWindowRecovery) handles crash, hang, and load failure gracefully
Platform checks are mostly isolated in windows.ts and apps.ts — not scattered randomly
Recently refactored: orphaned install-cli removed, validation extracted, GitHub IPC extracted
Custom protocol handler validates path traversal (relative() check prevents directory escape)
Log export creates structured ZIP with manifest.json for debugging
weaknesses: No centralized IPC channel registry — 50+ magic string channel names across 3 files
No centralized AppConfig — 5 modules reach for getStore() with raw string keys
GitHub OAuth client ID in plaintext source code — cannot be configured per deployment
App identity (names/IDs) duplicated in index.ts and migrate.ts
Only 2 test files for the entire desktop package — minimal test coverage
No IPC handler tests, no preload bridge tests, no window/electron integration tests
IPC error handling is inconsistent: mixed try/catch+rethrow, {error} return objects, and raw rejection propagation
github-ipc.ts registers directly to ipcMain.handle() outside central DI pattern — inconsistent
CORS origin oc://renderer hardcoded in sidecar.ts — coupled to custom protocol name
Health check endpoint path hardcoded — no server route abstraction
All dialog strings are English, hardcoded in main process — no i18n for native dialogs
store-keys and store-length IPC handlers omit RESERVED_STORE_NAMES check
OPENCODE_CHANNEL is build-time (import.meta.env) — same binary can't change channel without rebuild
open-path channel accepts user-supplied 'app' parameter with no validation before execFile
All 60 IPC handlers are unauthenticated — any renderer context can invoke any handler
Platform checks in windows.ts create duplicate BrowserWindow configuration per OS — if a new OS is added, all window creation code needs updating
recommendations: Create a shared channels.ts with typed channel name constants — eliminate all magic strings
Extract GitHub OAuth client ID and GitHub URLs into build-time env vars or a config file
Create a centralized AppConfig service that wraps electron-store with typed accessors
Consolidate APP_NAMES and APP_IDS into a shared module (not duplicated in index.ts and migrate.ts)
Add IPC handler tests — at minimum test that registerIpcHandlers registers the expected channels
Add preload bridge tests — verify window.api surface matches ElectronAPI contract
Standardize IPC error handling across all handlers — single convention (structured errors or exceptions)
Move github-ipc.ts handlers into the DI pattern (add to Deps rather than registering directly)
Add i18n support for native dialog strings or at minimum extract them to a constants file
Add validation to open-path 'app' parameter — allow-list or at minimum reject absolute paths
Extract RESERVED_STORE_NAMES check to a shared utility function used by all 7 store handlers
Make OPENCODE_CHANNEL a runtime env var OR ensure the build pipeline injects it properly
Add store-keys and store-length to the RESERVED_STORE_NAMES check
Extract CORS origin and protocol scheme to shared constants (used in 3+ files)
Consider abstracting BrowserWindow creation behind a factory to reduce OS-branching duplication
Add a cross-file test that verifies IPC channel symmetry between preload and main
